risk_rules.low: Read-only analysis, planning, classification, summarization, or readiness checks with no persistent storage and no external side effects.
risk_rules.medium: Uses external accounts, public deployment, paid services, messaging, publishing, persistent storage, or operational changes with owner approval.
risk_rules.high: Handles sensitive data at scale, financial transactions, legal/medical/financial decisions, destructive actions, surveillance, or autonomous real-world impact.

matching_rules.exact: Same primary capability and approved status.
matching_rules.strong: Approved tool covers most of the requested goal with minor differences.
matching_rules.partial: Approved or non-approved tool covers part of the requested workflow but not enough alone.
matching_rules.none: No registry entry materially covers the requested capability.
